subcodes.first_line: A Book for the one who hath turned toward My horizon and hath voiced My beauteous praise. Verily, when thou attainest unto My Tablet and findest its fragrance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب لمن اقبل الی افقی و نطق بثنائی الجمیل انک اذا فزت بلوحی و وجدت عرف
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @prayer for detachment, @praise and encouragement
